scopeType.title: Scope
scopeType.description: Whether this entity is an organization, a business unit, or a team.

aiDurability.title: AI durability (%)
aiDurability.description: Share of AI-written code that survives review and production instead of turning into rework.

engMaturityLevel.title: Engineering maturity (level)
engMaturityLevel.description: Consolidated engineering assessment level, from 1 to 5.

codeMaturityScore.title: Code maturity (/100)
codeMaturityScore.description: Zero-config code maturity verdict, from 0 to 100.

technologies.title: Technologies
technologies.description: Number of technologies placed on the tech radar for this scope.

deepLink.title: Open in ScaleQuality
deepLink.description: Deep link back to this scope in the ScaleQuality app.

parent.title: Parent scope
parent.description: The business unit or organization this scope rolls up into.
